source.purpose: Pressure ladder fired on turns 3 and 4 in playthrough 6 — consecutive turns. Even though cumulative pacing was on target (3 fires across 10 turns), the back-to-back firing collapsed the experiential tension graph. Fix: applyArchivistPatch now rejects ladder fires on the turn immediately after a prior fire, surfacing a drift event so the rejection is visible. This fixture verifies a fire proposed at turn N is rejected when another step fired at turn N-1.

pressureLadder.triggerCondition: Already fired in the prior turn.
Could fire if the prose crosses it.

input._comment_turnIndex: fixture.input.turnIndex is the turn whose prose this patch archives. The runner sets patch.turnIndex = turnIndex + 1, so patch.turnIndex becomes 1. Cooldown checks firedAtTurn === patch.turnIndex - 1 === 0, matching pressure_1.firedAtTurn below.

narrator.prose: The Archivist proposes pressure_2 fires this turn — the trigger reads satisfied. The cooldown should intercept it because pressure_1 fired last turn.
